nasb.text: Jonathan made David vow again because of his love for him, because he loved him as he loved his own life.

esv.text: And Jonathan made David swear again by his love for him, for he loved him as he loved his own soul.

cnv.text: 約拿單由於愛大衛，就使大衛再起誓；他愛大衛如同愛自己的命。

ccb.text: 约拿单因为像爱自己一样爱大卫，便叫他再次起誓。
